name: Battle.net

version_check.notes: NO public HTTP endpoint. Uses proprietary TCP protocol on us.patch.battle.net:1119. Agent-based (Battle.net Agent.app) with SQLite DBs. Not REST-based.

notes: Intel only (requires Rosetta 2 on Apple Silicon). Custom Blizzard Agent with SQLite DBs. Self-updating. No public version API exists. Download URL always returns latest installer.
